title: Sales Support Administrator
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Provide support to sales team
  • Monitor tender portals, acknowledge purchase orders
  • Perform tender submissions, including but not limited to price, specifications, corporate profile, factory certificates, etc.
  • Liaise, coordinate, prepare and follow-up with internal and external stakeholders
  • Prepare, manage and follow up on sales quotations
  • Maintain and update product price lists
  • Manage special pricing requests within NetSuite Data Entry
  • Process NetSuite Inventory Transfer Forms
  • Manage, respond and assist to sales and general enquiries
  • Provide administrative support, coordination and scheduling matters in relation to Preventive Maintenance (PM), Corrective Maintenance (CM), Equipment setup, commissioning, post-sales activities, Device inspection request, etc.
  • Generate sales invoices
  • Perform any other duties assigned by Sales Manager (SM) and Product Manager (PM)

Requirements:

  • Diploma in Business Administration or equivalent
  • Minimum 2 years of experience in Sales Support, Sales Admin or equivalent
  • Experienced in tender submissions
  • Familiar with ERP system (Eg. NetSuite)
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace
  • Strong organisational and coordination skills, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines
  • Detail-oriented, accurate, and methodical in handling pricing, tenders, quotations, and invoicing
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills to liaise effectively with internal and external stakeholders
  • Able to work independently as well as collaboratively in a fast-paced environment

postedCompany.description:
Since being established in 2000, Yeap Medical Supplies Pte Ltd has come to be regarded as a reputable organization representing distinguished principals. To our customers we have been more than just a reliable supplier. We are also known to be an exceptional service provider.

Apart from representing some of the world’s leading medical brands in various market segments, we have successfully grown and marketed our own in-house brands and products. Today, it is common to find various items carrying our in-house brands, ASSURE, ASSURE Rehab and Bactishield, in many medical establishments.

At YMS, we aim to be the connection between our customers to their healthcare needs, as well as our principal’s connection to their target market. We also aim to provide our customers with essential services and products in a timely, reliable and affordable manner. In so doing, we hope to enhance the value of our principal’s and manufacturer’s products with sustainable growth and profits.
postedCompany.name: YEAP MEDICAL SUPPLIES PTE. LTD.
